backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TRI-GITA backend, handling lead submission, deletion, and retrieval with admin access control, plus user profile storage using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (logo in Header and hero background image) to their respective files and component dependencies with test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, styling themes, and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, Services, etc.) within a LanguageProvider context and renders a FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank financing stats (loan percentage, customer payment, tenure) with a shimmer animation and a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a pulse ring animation, hover tooltip using the correct translation key, and a link to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy background displaying brand info, WhatsApp link, and contact details (phones, email, address, service area) using translation keys.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, with a responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards using i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with fields for name, phone, email, city, and system size; validates input, submits via a React Query mutation, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns, animated into view via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section about the government solar scheme, showing benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process timeline with icons and translated content.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-card services section (residential and commercial solar) with images, feature lists, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, icons, and translated titles/descriptions highlighting company advantages.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing a setter.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the 'leads' query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines multilingual translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, services, and warranty content.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage context with the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using oklch, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing features (logo and hero background image additions) and pending action requests (AR-1, AR-2) for the TRI-GITA SERVICES project at schema version 3.
